{{nihongo|'''Warihimeno Shrine former site'''|和理比賣神社 旧社地}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Warihimeno Shrine former site'''|和理比賣神社 旧社地}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Warihimeno Shrine former site'''|和理比賣神社 旧社地}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Warihimeno Shrine former site'''|和理比賣神社 旧社地}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Warihimeno Shrine former site'''|和理比賣神社 旧社地}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]].
